heading: Definition
label: 21101 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2110136:2413., , .June 12, 1984Pub. L. 98–314, § 1498 Stat. 239The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
